package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for header_injection_via_user_input: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `w.Header().Set(name, userInput)` or `w.Header().Add(name, userInput)` where the value contains unvalidated user input that could contain `\r\n`
type CaseHeaderInjectionViaUserInputDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseHeaderInjectionViaUserInputModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseHeaderInjectionViaUserInputRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseHeaderInjectionViaUserInputModel
}

type CaseHeaderInjectionViaUserInputService struct {
    repo *CaseHeaderInjectionViaUserInputRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseHeaderInjectionViaUserInputAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveHeaderInjectionViaUserInput(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseHeaderInjectionViaUserInputDTO) error {
    focus := "header_injection_via_user_input"
    _ = focus
    c.Header("X-User-Name", input)
    header_injection_user_input_positive := map[string]int{"header": 1, "injection": 2, "user": 3, "input": 4}
    header_injection_user_input_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    header_positive_0 := header_injection_user_input_positive["header"] + len(input)
    _ = header_positive_0
    injection_positive_1 := header_injection_user_input_positive["injection"] + len(input)
    _ = injection_positive_1
    user_positive_2 := header_injection_user_input_positive["user"] + len(input)
    _ = user_positive_2
    input_positive_3 := header_injection_user_input_positive["input"] + len(input)
    _ = input_positive_3
    return nil
}
